title: pasania fissa var. tunkinensis
intro: Pasania fissa var. tunkinensis is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae, and is also known as Vietnamese laurel. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pasania fissa var. tunkinensis include treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Pasania fissa var. tunkinensis is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
